title: Realistic Enough for What? A Multidimensional Framework for Evaluating Cyber Environments — Artifacts

creators.name: Stratosphere Laboratory, Czech Technical University in Prague

description: Use-case realism-requirement profiles, a preliminary evaluation of 11 cyber environments across 11 realism dimensions, and an interactive scorecard application. Companion artifacts to the paper "Realistic Enough for What? A Multidimensional Framework for Evaluating Cyber Environments."
